◎简　　介  

　　This year marks the 38th anniversary of the seminal music documentary, HEARTWORN HIGHWAYS, a film that explored and captured the nascent roots of the Outlaw Country movement in the mid-70s. HEARTWORN HIGHWAYS REVISTED will celebrate the authenticity and express the feelings of the legendary original, via a community of contemporary "outlaws" living and creating music in Nashvil...
